description: User can open a browser dashboard that auto-detects the viewer timezone and shows a live local Claude promotion clock.
verify: Open the dashboard in a browser
Confirm the timezone label matches the browser timezone
Confirm the live clock and countdown update without a refresh

description: User can see an infographic of historical peak and off-peak windows converted into the viewer timezone.
verify: Inspect the weekly matrix and history timeline
Confirm each window is labeled as peak or off-peak and shown in local time

description: User can see a forecasted next promotion start that is computed from the observed historical pattern rather than hard-coded.
verify: Confirm the estimate includes a timestamp, confidence score, and supporting rationale

description: Developer can replace the seeded history with their own observations without rewriting the UI.
verify: Open the data file referenced in the docs
Confirm the history schema is documented in code and isolated from UI code
